title: Decision record: atomic file write via temp-then-rename
description:
## Decision
FileBackend::put() writes to a unique temp file (same directory, mode 0600) then renames it over the target path.

## Rationale
rename(2) is atomic on POSIX for same-filesystem paths. A reader never sees a partial write. A crash between write and rename leaves the temp file but does not corrupt the original. The temp file name uses an AtomicU64 counter + PID to avoid collisions from concurrent writers. Mode 0600 ensures the secret is not world-readable even transiently.

## Record this as a confirmed good decision.
